forgot_password_info: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
password_reset_success: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
password_reset_error: An error occurred while resetting your password. Please try again.
password_reset_link_sent: A password reset link has been sent to your email address.
change_password_info: Please enter your current password and the new password you would like to set.
Your password has been changed successfu: Your password has been changed successfully.
There was an error changing your passwor: There was an error changing your password.
